title: theme — HTTP routes
description: Two host audiences: tenant (admin + design-role manage themes/presets/overrides; end users manage per-user preference), and platform-admin (Academorix staff manage the cross-tenant preset library). Every action is declared via #[AsAction] on a single-invoke controller — no routes/*.php file required at the app level.

groups.name: tenant-themes
groups.description: Tenant admin surface for themes, presets, and token overrides.

routes.description: List every theme in the tenant. Paginated.
Create a theme referencing a preset. Row starts is_active=false; use /activate to flip.

Activate the theme for its mode. Deactivates any prior active theme in the same (tenant, mode) in the same DB txn. Freezes tokens_snapshot. Fires ThemeActivated. Dispatches RegenerateRenderedCssJob after commit.
Dry-run render. Returns the resolved token map + compiled CSS + contrast audit findings WITHOUT persisting. Useful for the admin UI's preview panel before activate.
Returns the currently-active theme (or two rows for tenants with both light+dark active). Resolves per the caller's user-theme-preference (mode + accessibility overrides). Hot path — cached.
List platform-provided presets + tenant custom presets. Filter by mode/category.
Create a tenant custom preset. Gated by theme_custom_presets entitlement cap. tenant_id auto-populated; NEVER accepts NULL from a tenant caller.
Clone any preset (platform or tenant custom) into a new tenant custom preset. Gated by theme_custom_presets entitlement cap.
Create a per-token override on a theme. Gated by theme_token_overrides entitlement cap. Fires RegenerateRenderedCssJob after commit.
Remove an override; theme falls back to underlying preset value on next resolution. Fires RegenerateRenderedCssJob after commit.
Caller's own per-user theme preference. Auto-provisioned on first read (preferred_mode='auto', accessibility_overrides={}).
Update the caller's preferred_mode + accessibility_overrides. Fires UserThemePreferenceUpdated.

groups.name: platform-themes
groups.description: Academorix-staff-only cross-tenant preset library management. Manages the platform preset catalog (tenant_id NULL rows).

routes.description: List platform presets (tenant_id NULL) + cross-tenant custom preset usage stats.
Add a new platform preset. tenant_id NULL. Every tenant sees the preset on next /api/v1/theme-presets read.
Update a platform preset. Triggers MigrateThemeTokensOnPresetUpdateJob for every tenant Theme that references this preset.
Soft-delete a platform preset. Refused when any active Theme references it.
